# Available workflows

This directory contains the GitHub Actions workflows used for CI validation,
maintenance, and repository automation.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->

| Workflow file                          | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Trigger                                                                                                                                                     |
| :------------------------------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | :---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [build.yml](./build.yml)               | Builds and validates the container image, runs Go unit tests and coverage checks when Go files change, and publishes the image to `ghcr.io` on non-PR runs. It also opens an issue with AI-generated diagnostics when the Docker build or runtime validation fails. | `workflow_dispatch`, `push` to `master` or `v*` tags, `pull_request` targeting `master`                                                                     |
| [fixers.yml](./fixers.yml)             | Runs Copilot CLI remediation jobs for Docker build failures and `golangci-lint` findings, and prepares pull requests with the proposed fixes. The issue-triggered jobs only run when the opened issue already carries the matching remediation label.               | `workflow_dispatch`, `issues` on `opened` when the issue already includes either `docker-build-issue` or `golangci-lint-issue`                              |
| [linter.yml](./linter.yml)             | Counts lines of code, checks documentation links, runs `super-linter`, and files an issue with AI-assisted analysis when linting fails.                                                                                                                             | `push`, `pull_request`                                                                                                                                      |
| [on-demand_ci.yml](./on-demand_ci.yml) | Checks shell script formatting and runs the functional end-to-end demo on the self-hosted environment. When the functional test runs, it always exports and uploads Kind cluster logs.                                                                              | `push` for `*.go` and `*.sh` changes outside `.github/`, `pull_request` on `opened`, `synchronize`, or `reopened`, and `pull_request_review` on `submitted` |
| [spell.yml](./spell.yml)               | Verifies documentation spelling with both `reviewdog/action-misspell` and `pyspelling`.                                                                                                                                                                             | `push` for Markdown changes outside `.github/`, `pull_request_review` on `submitted`                                                                        |
| [update.yml](./update.yml)             | Creates pull requests to refresh version-managed files and update the `Dockerfile`.                                                                                                                                                                                 | Weekly schedule (`0 0 * * 5`) and `workflow_dispatch`                                                                                                       |
| [verifiers.yml](./verifiers.yml)       | Runs `golangci-lint` on every workflow run, creates an issue with AI-generated analysis when linting fails, and launches a janitor-style Copilot CLI task to reduce technical debt and open a pull request only on scheduled or manually dispatched runs.           | `push` for `*.go` changes, weekly schedule (`0 0 * * 5`), and `workflow_dispatch`                                                                           |

<!-- markdownlint-enable MD013 -->
